title: St. Mary's Cathedral, Punalur
tagline: St. Mary's Cathedral, Punalur — heritage city of Kerala

overview.short: St. Mary's Cathedral, Punalur is a much-loved heritage city in Kerala, known for forts and architecture.
overview.description: St. Mary's Cathedral is the first church in the centuries-old history of this industrial town Punalur, on the banks of Kallada river. Catholics and Christian faithful working in Punalur Paper Mills, Railway and Rubber Estates along with the farmers were the early community of the church. Schools, orphanage, mission centers and other institutions start building gradually to meet the growing demands of the community of vibrant ethnic culture.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Punalur
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Punalur (Latin: Punaluren(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Punalur in the ecclesiastical province of Trivandrum in India.

topPlaces.name: Punalur Suspension Bridge
topPlaces.description: The Punalur Suspension Bridge, located in Punalur, India is a 400-foot (120 m)-long 19th-century motorable bridge in Kerala, which was built by Travancore Government and is now a historical attraction. It was designed to shake when walked on, with the intention of deterring animals from crossing from the forest into the town.

topPlaces.name: Punalur
topPlaces.description: Punalur is a municipality in the Kollam district of Kerala, India. It is the headquarters of the Punalur Taluk and Punalur Revenue Division.

topPlaces.name: Piravanthoor
topPlaces.description: Piravanthoor (Piravanthur) is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India. Piravanthoor is a part of Pathanapuram Block Panchayat and Kollam district Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Elikkattoor
topPlaces.description: Elikkattoor is a village in India near Punalur, Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Karavaloor
topPlaces.description: Karavaloor is a village in Kollam district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is mainly known for the famous Peedika Bhagavathi Temple and its Meena-Thiruvathira Festival, as it is one of the well-known festivals in Kollam District.

topPlaces.name: Mathra, Kerala
topPlaces.description: Mathra is a village in Kollam district in the Indian state of Kerala, located near the town of Punalur. It is the headquarters of Mathra Grama Panchayat, a fertile area in which many residents are engaged in farming..

topPlaces.name: Pavumba
topPlaces.description: Pavumba is a village in the outskirts of Kollam district, Pavumba is a village in Thazhava Panchayat located in the north-east of Karunagapalli taluk. It is bordered by Vallikunnam in the north, Todiyur in the south, Sooranad in the east, and Thazhava village in the Thazhava panchayat in the west.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary's Cathedral, Punalur?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary's Cathedral, Punalur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary's Cathedral, Punalur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (60 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary's Cathedral, Punalur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary's Cathedral, Punalur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary's Cathedral, Punalur?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary's Cathedral, Punalur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary's Cathedral, Punalur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Diocese of Punalur, Punalur Suspension Bridge, Punalur, Piravanthoor, Elikkattoor.
